message:
test(fr-persist): proptest LZF round-trip + budget contract (br-frankenredis-xmr8 follow-up)

4 new proptest properties (1024 cases each, 4 strategies × random/repeated/
tile-pattern inputs) lock in the LZF encoder contracts shipped in 9dee1ef:

* lzf_compress_never_panics(input, budget): the encoder must not panic
  on any (input, out_budget) combination, including 0-len input and
  0-byte budget.
* lzf_compress_decompress_round_trips(input): when the encoder returns
  Some(compressed), lzf_decompress(compressed, input.len()) must
  reconstruct the original bytes byte-for-byte. Stresses the
  literal-only and backref code paths via repetition-heavy mosaics.
* lzf_compress_respects_budget(input, budget): when Some(compressed)
  is returned, compressed.len() <= budget. Catches any future
  refactor that bypasses the in-loop "out > out_budget" guards.
* rdb_encode_decode_string_round_trips(input): the production
  invariant — rdb_encode_string + rdb_decode_string round-trip
  identity, regardless of whether the LZF heuristic picked the
  compressed or raw form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
